name: laicluse-agent-tools
description: Marketplace-wide utilities for the laicluse-agent-tools marketplace. Currently ships /whats-new (namespaced as /laicluse-agent-tools:whats-new when needed), a one-stop reader for the post-update CHANGELOG section of any installed plugin.
